'''EUW:''' rare breed |checkboxAutoTeams=Yes |checkbox2=No |role=Coach |issub1=No |istrainee1=No |issub2=No |istrainee2=No |issub3=Yes |istrainee3=No |issub4=No |istrainee4=No |issub5=No |istrainee5=No |checkbox3=No |stream=https://www.twitch.tv/damonte |twitter=Damonte |instagram=t.damonte |youtube=https://youtube.com/channel/UCx7lH9kM1tEYnJaFFCXicEw |lolpros=https://lolpros.gg/player/damonte/ |deeplol=https://www.deeplol.gg/pro/Damonte |checkboxSuppressOrgNavbox=No |checkboxSBS=Yes |checkboxTOCR=Yes |checkbox-res=No |checkboxIsSub=No |checkboxPrev=No }} ==Biography== ===2015 Season=== Tanner "'''Damonte'''" Damonte began playing ''League of Legends'' competitively in early 2015, with the nicknames '''Mini''' and '''Mini Me'''. In January, he played with [[Infinity Esports (2015 North American Team)|Infinity Esports]] in the [[2015 NA Challenger Series/Spring Qualifier|NACS Spring Qualifier]], but was eliminated in round 1 by [[Team Liquid Academy]]. Throughout the course of the year, he played on multiple other teams, including [[Cerberus eSports]] and [[Noble eSports]], with whom he participated in the [[AlphaDraft Challenger League]]. ===2016 Season=== In October 2015, Damonte joined [[Serpentis eSports]]. The team played in the [[HTC Ascension]] Cup but later disbanded after an unsuccessful [[NA Challenger Series/2016 Season/Spring Qualifiers/Open Qualifier|NACS Spring Qualifier]] run in January 2016. Damonte then joined [[the monkeys]] (which would later rename to [[Destined For Glory]]) for the [[NA Challenger Series/2016 Season/Summer Qualifiers/Open Qualifier|Summer Open Qualifier]]. This time, his team made the [[NA Challenger Series/2016 Season/Summer Qualifiers|Main Qualifier]] but fell to [[Cloud9 Challenger]]. In June, Damonte joined [[Nova eSports (North American Team)|Nova eSports]], a new team that had purchased [[Ember]]'s [[NA Challenger Series/2016 Season/Summer Season|NACS Summer Season]] seed. == Trivia == * At the same time as making Challenger the first time, he was also playing baseball and American football at his high school. * Became known for his {{ci|Qiyana}} after being the first LCS player to play and win with it after its release. * Known for his catchphrase, "Tanner Time." * One of his coaches in amateur once trolled Leaguepedia staff by telling them he was born in Luxembourg. {{PlayerStatsTrivia}} == Tournament Results == {{PlayerResults|show=overviewpage}} {{PlayerShowmatchResults|show=overviewpage}} {{PlayerResults1v1|show=overviewpage}} ==Media== {{PlayerMedia}} === Images === {{PlayerProfileGallery}} {{PlayerPageEnd}}
